name_en: 🆕 [ M81520 Pink] New Women's Coin Wallet Clutch. Small yet extremely practical, this colorful envelope-style coin wallet is the perfect companion for modern women in the city. Its compact size makes it easy to fit into bags or even pockets. Dimensions: 11X8cm v.
